title: abrus abrus
intro: Abrus abrus, also known as rosary pea or crab's eye, is a flowering plant in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Abrus abrus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and snake bites. The herbal preparations of Abrus abrus include teas, infusions, and topical applications, although caution is advised due to the plant's potential toxicity.
